DESCRIPTION: Alternately increase and reduce the cost of each card in your hand in a random order by #b1 this turn. The first card's cost is always increased.
Reduce the next instance of unblocked attack damage taken and deal damage back to the attacker.
Whenever an enemy is targeted with an #yIgnite card, deal damage to it equal to your Heat and reduce Heat. Each turn, Heat is reduced by #b1.
Deal damage to the target equal to your #yHeat amount. Then #yHeat is reduced by #b1 for each time you Ignited.
Whenever you apply Laceration to an enemy, it loses HP. Enemy #rdies at the start of its turn, if its Laceration is equal to or greater than its HP.
Gain #yBlock whenever you attack a Frightened enemy. Fright is removed when the enemy attacks.
#yExhaust a card. Gain #yScrap #yArmor equal to the Scrapped card’s cost.
Increase #yReckless cards' attack damage and #yBlock effectiveness. Whenever you play a #yReckless card, Poise is reduced by #b1.
Intensity adds additional damage to #yIgnite. You cannot #yIgnite without #yHeat.
